request: Fix two visual-fit issues from the package-rename-scoped chore: (1) hero SVG label in site-src/_includes/hero-symbols/cli.njk where 'npx @friedbotstudio/create-baseline' overflows the rect at width=232; (2) landing CLI strip in site-src/index.njk where 'npx @friedbotstudio/create-baseline@latest .' may wrap/truncate.
